title: asclepias scheryi
intro: Asclepias scheryi, also known as Schery's milkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias scheryi include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Asclepias scheryi can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
